# WriteFit

> WriteFit is an AI writing coach. It doesn't write for you — it helps you practice, revise, and build your own voice over time. 15 minutes a day: you write first, AI diagnoses 3 specific issues, you revise, compare versions, and save what works.

WriteFit（AI 写作教练）—— AI 不替你写，只教你写。每天 15 分钟训练闭环：你先写 → AI 诊断 3 个具体问题 → 你自己改 → 版本对比 → 把好句存入个人素材库。

## Key facts

- Category: AI writing coach / writing training tool (educational SaaS)
- Differentiator: unlike AI ghostwriting tools (e.g. ChatGPT), WriteFit never writes text for the user; it only diagnoses and coaches
- Core loop: write (15 min, no AI help) → AI diagnosis (3 specific issues) → user revises → version diff → save good sentences/ideas to a personal library
- Features: Draft Lab, Sentence Gym, Idea Bank, version comparison, progress tracking
- Pricing: Free tier (5 AI coaching sessions/day); Basic $19.9/month or $199/year (20 sessions/day + unlimited BYOK); Pro $29.9/month or $299/year (100 sessions/day + unlimited BYOK)
- Languages: English (/) and Chinese (/zh)
- Try without login: /practice/dev

## Pages

- [Home](https://writefit.app/): product overview, the 5-step training loop, who it's for
- [Pricing](https://writefit.app/pricing): Free / Basic / Pro plans, BYOK explanation
- [Interactive demo (no login)](https://writefit.app/practice/dev): try a daily writing exercise with AI feedback
- [About](https://writefit.app/about): why WriteFit exists, founded by Jason Guo
- [Methodology](https://writefit.app/methodology): the WriteFit Loop, 4 diagnosis dimensions, the learning science behind it
- [Blog](https://writefit.app/blog): essays on writing craft, personal voice, and training writing with AI (RSS: /feed.xml)
- [Privacy Policy](https://writefit.app/privacy): data handling, BYOK key storage (browser localStorage only)
- [Terms of Service](https://writefit.app/terms): content ownership (users own their writing), refund policy
- [中文首页](https://writefit.app/zh): WriteFit 中文版

## Contact

- Website: https://writefit.app
- Email: support@writefit.app
- Founder: Jason Guo
